notes: Two-leg GBPJPY/AUDJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar; DEV Sharpe was positive but OOS net Sharpe was negative. It is the next unbuilt rank-23 tail pair after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739/12747/12749/12751/12756/12758/12760/12762/12764/12765/12766/12768/12770 baskets.

Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. GBPJPY.DWX and AUDJPY.DWX are the traded legs; USDJPY.DWX is declared only as custom-symbol conversion history for USD-denominated JPY-cross accounting.

Repair note 2026-06-30: Q05 hit repeated 1800-second run_smoke timeouts and then NO_HISTORY/HISTORY_CONTEXT_INVALID while using USD tester currency. The EA already selects USDJPY.DWX in OnInit; the manifest now declares that conversion history so downstream history checks and work-item payloads match the EA runtime contract.
